summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No security-sensitive items were detected in hydrated refs. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned.

actions.reason: Focused useful contributor PR with proof and review feedback; no duplicate/superseding canonical is established in this shard.
Related to the #92888 auth-status symptom family, but it is a narrow UI refresh path with active contributor follow-up and unresolved proof/review state.

Human maintainer decision needed on whether to keep or land this focused Telegram follow-up, because the linked issue is already closed as implemented but the PR has proof, green checks, and active author follow-up.
Maintainer judgment is needed for a broad plugin API feature PR with dirty merge state and unresolved Codex review findings; no close or fix action is allowed by this inventory job.
Maintainer-owned draft provider feature work should remain independent and waiting on its author; no inventory closeout is justified.
